backend/main.mo: Main canister defines user profiles, artworks, jewelry, orders, and contact messages with access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing files, components, and test IDs for branding updates and enhanced shimmer styling.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing frontend components, pages, and styling updates across the app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base and theme variable definitions for light/dark modes with color tokens and global styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting document metadata and bootstrapping the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack Router routes for public and admin pages, wraps the app with layout and theme providers.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: Displays an access‑denied message with login or home-navigation options based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/auth/AdminRouteG: Protects admin routes by checking authentication and admin permissions, showing loading or denial states as needed.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button using Internet Identity with shimmer styling and handling of login edge cases.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal prompting new authenticated users to enter their name and save their profile.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Renders the site footer with copyright info and a link to caffeine.ai including hostname-based tracking.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Provides the site header with logo, navigation links, admin link, login button, and responsive mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteLayou: Wraps pages with a header, footer, and main content area.
frontend/src/components/states/EmptyStat: Displays an empty state with optional icon, description, and action.
frontend/src/components/states/ErrorStat: Shows an error alert with an optional retry button.
frontend/src/components/states/LoadingSt: Shows a centered loading spinner with a message.
frontend/src/components/storefront/Artwo: Displays an artwork card with image, title, price, and availability, linking to artwork detail.
frontend/src/components/storefront/Jewel: Displays a jewelry card with image, name, type, price, and availability, linking to jewelry detail.
frontend/src/components/storefront/Purch: Form for submitting purchase inquiries, validating inputs and creating orders via mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and status handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, admin status, artworks, and related data via the actor API.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining base styles, color variables, dark mode themes, and custom metallic/shimmer utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry that initializes React, wraps the app with Internet Identity and React Query providers, and loads global styles.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Page that loads and displays about‑the‑artist content with fallback loading state and descriptive text.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminArtworkEdi: Form page for creating or editing artwork items, including image upload and validation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminArtworksPa: Admin table listing all artworks with options to add, edit, or delete entries.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminContactMes: Admin view displaying submitted contact messages sorted by newest first.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Admin dashboard showing stats and navigation links for artworks, jewelry, orders, and messages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminJewelryEdi: Form page for creating or editing jewelry items, supporting image upload and field validation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminJewelryPag: Admin page listing jewelry items with edit/delete actions, using queries for fetching and mutation for deleting.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrdersPage: Admin interface for viewing and managing purchase inquiries, including marking orders as handled and displaying item details.
frontend/src/pages/ArtworkDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed artwork info with image, description, availability badge, and purchase inquiry form, handling loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact form page allowing users to submit messages, with validation, mutation handling, and a success confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Artwork listing page with search, availability filters, and responsive grid, handling loading, errors, and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with hero section and featured artworks pulled from available artwork data.
frontend/src/pages/JewelryDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed information for a single jewelry item with image, specs, description, and purchase inquiry form.
frontend/src/pages/JewelryPage.tsx: Shows a searchable and filterable grid of jewelry items using availability and text filters.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters and session-stored values.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme colors, typography, shadows, animations, and container settings.
project_state.json: Project state file describing the site’s purpose, visual direction, features, and version metadata.
